# Comprehensive Psychological Services (CPS)

> Utah's trusted behavioral health practice since 1986. Evidence-based neuropsychological evaluations, ADHD testing, autism assessments, custody evaluations, ketamine therapy, and intensive outpatient programs across three Utah locations.

## About

Comprehensive Psychological Services (CPS) is a licensed behavioral health organization established in 1986 in Salt Lake City, Utah. Founded by Steven Szykula, Ph.D., CPS employs 20+ licensed professionals including doctoral-level psychologists, licensed clinical social workers, and clinical mental health counselors. CPS holds the Best Practice Award for clinical excellence and serves individuals, families, employers, courts, attorneys, and healthcare systems across the Wasatch Front. CPS is a HIPAA-compliant practice; all evaluations follow evidence-based, validated protocols.

## Contact

- Phone: (801) 483-1600
- Fax: (801) 483-1610
- Email: cps@wecanhelpout.com
- Website: https://psychandcustodyevaluations.com
- Hours: Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM Mountain Time

## Locations

### Salt Lake City (Main Office)
1208 East 3300 South, Salt Lake City, UT 84106 — Serving Salt Lake County.

### Layton
1916 North 700 West, Suite 190, Layton, UT 84041 — Serving Davis & Weber Counties.

### West Jordan
9069 South 1300 West, Suite D, West Jordan, UT 84088 — Serving South Valley (West Jordan, South Jordan, Draper, Sandy, Riverton, Herriman).

## Evaluation Services

- [Neuropsychological Evaluations](/neuropsychologist-near-me): Comprehensive brain-behavior assessments for ADHD, TBI, memory, learning disabilities, and cognitive concerns.
- [ADHD Evaluation](/adhd-evaluation-near-me): Thorough multi-method ADHD testing for children, teens, and adults.
- [ADHD Diagnosis](/adhd-diagnosis-near-me): Professional ADHD diagnosis using DSM-5-TR criteria.
- [ADHD Testing](/adhd-testing): Computerized attention tests, rating scales, and cognitive assessment.
- [Neuropsychological Testing for ADHD](/neuropsychological-testing-for-adhd): In-depth neuropsych battery mapping attention, executive function, and processing speed.
- [Autism Assessment](/autism-assessment): Comprehensive autism spectrum evaluations for all ages.
- [ADOS-2 Testing](/ados-2-testing-near-me): Gold-standard autism diagnostic observation schedule.
- [Cognitive Evaluation](/cognitive-evaluation-near-me): IQ testing, memory assessment, and executive function evaluation.
- [Custody Evaluation](/custody-evaluator-near-me): Court-accepted child custody evaluations and parental fitness assessments.

## Treatment Services

- [Ketamine & Spravato Therapy](/ketamine-depression-treatment-near-me): FDA-approved ketamine and esketamine for treatment-resistant depression.
- Intensive Outpatient Programs (IOP): Adult and adolescent programs.
- Counseling & Psychotherapy: Individual, couples, and family therapy.
- Medication Management: Psychiatric medication therapy.
- Neurofeedback / Brain Training: EEG-based brain training.
- Substance Abuse Treatment: Court-admissible evaluations and Prime for Life classes.
- Telehealth: Virtual therapy and consultation.

## Conditions We Evaluate & Treat

- [Adult ADHD](/conditions/adhd-in-adults): Evaluation and treatment for ADHD diagnosed in adulthood.
- [Adult Autism](/conditions/autism-in-adults): Gold-standard ADOS-2 evaluation for adults, including those who mask.
- [Concussion & TBI](/conditions/concussion-tbi): Post-concussion and traumatic brain injury neuropsychological evaluation.
- [Dementia & Memory Concerns](/conditions/dementia-memory): Cognitive profiling for MCI, Alzheimer's, and other dementias.
- [Learning Disability](/conditions/learning-disability): Psychoeducational testing for dyslexia, dysgraphia, dyscalculia, and NVLD — accepted for IEP/504.
- [Treatment-Resistant Depression](/conditions/treatment-resistant-depression): Ketamine, Spravato, IOP, and medication management for depression that hasn't responded to first-line therapy.

## Audiences Served

- [Parents & Families](/for/parents): Pediatric evaluations, custody support, school-related testing.
- [Attorneys](/for/attorneys): Court-accepted custody and forensic psychological evaluations.
- [Schools](/for/schools): Learning disability, ADHD, and autism evaluations for IEP/504 processes.
- [Employers](/for/employers): Fitness-for-duty, pre-employment psychological, and police/fire evaluations.
- [Primary-Care Referrers](/for/referrers): Referral pathway for PCPs and psychiatrists needing diagnostic clarification.

## Blog & Resources

- [Patient Resources](/resources): Forms, insurance, what to bring, patient rights.
- [HIPAA Notice of Privacy Practices](/hipaa): How CPS protects your health information.
- [About CPS](/about): Practice history and mission.
- [Our Team](/team): Licensed psychologists and clinicians.
- [Blog](/blog): Evidence-based articles on ADHD, autism, custody, neuropsychology, and ketamine therapy.
- [Newsletter](/newsletter): Evaluation-prep tips and evidence-based updates for caregivers, attorneys, and referrers.

## Insurance

Most major insurance plans accepted including Blue Cross Blue Shield, Aetna, Cigna, United Healthcare, Medicare, and Utah Medicaid plans. Benefits verification performed before first appointment. Self-pay rates and payment plans available.

## Service Areas

Utah, Salt Lake City, Salt Lake County, Davis County (Layton, Bountiful, Farmington, Kaysville, Clearfield), Weber County (Ogden, Roy, Riverdale), West Jordan, South Jordan, Sandy, Draper, Murray, Midvale, Riverton, Herriman.

## Credentials & Affiliations

- American Psychological Association (APA)
- American Academy of Clinical Neuropsychology (AACN)
- Utah Psychological Association (UPA)
- Society for Personality and Social Psychology (SPSP)
- HIPAA-compliant practice
- Best Practice Award recipient
